Should the stars of the constellations with the planets posited
therein be full of smoke, flames and sparks, remain invisible for no
reason, the entire population along with their king would be annihi-
lated.

When two Moons shine in the sky, Brahmapas will then
achieve great prosperity and happiness ere long. Should there be
two Suns, Ksatriyas would engage themselves in warfare; and
should there be three or more Suns, there would be dissolution of
the world.
